layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: AO 93 (SDNY Rev. 01/17) Search and Seizure Warrant(Page 2)

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: II. Items to Be Seized

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ATTACHMENT A

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: B. Review of ESI

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I. The Subject Devices to Be Searched

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The Subject Devices are particularly described as compact discs stored in containers

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: marked with FBI evidence numbers 15, 16, 17, 18, and 22, seized from the residence located at 9

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: East 71st Street, New York, New York, on or about July 7, 2019.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: This warant authorizes the seizure of certain evidence, fruits, and instrumentalities of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: violations of Title 18, United States Code, Sections 1591 (sex trafficking of minors), and 371 (sex

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: trafficking conspiracy) (the "Subject Offenses") described as follows:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In conducting this review, law enforcement personnel may use various techniques to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determine which files or other ESI contain evidence or fruits of the Subject Offenses. Such

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: techniques may include, for example:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: A. Evidence, Fruits, and Instrumentalities of the Subject Offenses

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any documents or communications with or regarding victims or potential victims

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the Subject Offenses;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any nude, partially nude, or sexually suggestive photographs of individuals who

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: appear to be teenage girls, or younger;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Motion pictures, films, videos, and other recordings of visual or written depictions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of minors engaged in sexually explicit conduct, as defined in 18 U.S.C. s 2256(2);

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any child erotica, defined as suggestive visual depictions of nude minors that do

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not constitute child pornography as defined by 18 U.S.C. $ 2256(8).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any photographs of victims or potential victims of the Subject Offnses;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Records or other items that evidence ownership, control, or use of, or access to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: devices, storage media, and related electronic equipment used to access, transmit, or store

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: information relating to the Subject Offenses, including, but not limited to, sales receipts,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: warranties, bills for Internet access, handwritten notes, registry entries, configuration files, saved

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: usernames and passwords, user profiles, e-mail contacts, and photographs;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Law enforcement personnel (including, in addition to law enforcement officers and agents,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and depending on the nature of the ESI and the status of the investigation and related proceedings,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: attorneys for the government, attorney support staff, agency personnel assisting the government in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: this investigation, and outside technical experts under government control) will create a forensic

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: image of the Subject Devices (if practicable) and review the ESI contained therein for information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: responsive to the warrant.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "scanning"” storage areas to discover and posibly recover recently deleted data or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: deliberately hidden files; and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reviewing metadat,system information,configurationfiles,registydata,and ay

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other information refl ecting how, when, and by whom the computer was used.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: surveying directories or folders and the individual files they contain (analogous to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: believed to contain pertinent files);

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: looking at the outside of a file cabinet for the markings it contains and opening a drawer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: conducting a file-by-file review by "pening" or reading the first few "pages" of such

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: examination of each document in a file cabinet to determine its relevance);

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: files in order to determine their precise contents (analogous to performing a cursory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performing electronic keyword searches through all electronic storage areas to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determine the existence and location of data potentially related to the subject matter of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the investigation6; and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Law enforcement personnel will make reasonable efforts to search only for files,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: documents, or other electronically stored information within the categories identified in Section

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I.A of this Attachment. However, law enforcement personnel are authorized to conduct a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: complete review of all the ESI from seized devices or storage media if necessary to evaluate its

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contents and to locate all data responsive to the warrant.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 6 Keyword searches alone are typically inadequate to detect all relevant data. For one thing,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: keyword searches work only for text data, yet many types of files, such as images and videos, do

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not store data as searchable text. Moreover, even as to text data, there may be information properly

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: subject to seizure but that is not captured by a keyword search because the information does not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contain the keywords being searched.
